zh.lifeSummary: 當Geoffroy I de Montfort-le-Hédé於1145年出生在法國布列塔尼易爾-吉維拉蒙特福吉素-時，他的父親Guillaume de Montfort-le-Hédé I30歲，母親Amicie de Rohun de Porhoët21歲。他於1168年與Gervaise de Saye結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他去世於1187年在法國布列塔尼易爾-吉維拉雷斯享年42歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Geoffroy I de Montfort-le-Hédé于1145年出生在法国布列塔尼易爾-吉維拉蒙特福吉素-时，他的父亲Guillaume de Montfort-le-Hédé I30岁，母亲Amicie de Rohun de Porhoët21岁。他于1168年与Gervaise de Saye结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和2个女儿的父母。他去世于1187年在法国布列塔尼易爾-吉維拉雷斯享年42岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Geoffroy
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Of Germanic (Frankish and Lombard) origin, introduced to Britain by the Normans. It was in regular use among the counts of Anjou, ancestors of the English royal house of Plantagenet, who were descended from Geoffrey Plantagenet, Count of Anjou ( 1113–51 ). It was a particularly popular name in England and France in the later Middle Ages; notable bearers in England include the poet Geoffrey Chaucer ( c.1340–1400 ) and in Wales the chronicler Geoffrey of Monmouth ( d. 1155 ). The original form and meaning of the name is disputed. According to one theory, it is merely a variant of Godfrey ; others derive the first part from the Germanic word gawia ‘territory’, walah ‘stranger’, or gisil ‘pledge’. Medieval forms can be found to support all these theories, and it is possible that several names have fallen together, or that the name was subjected to reanalysis by folk etymology at an early date.

en.lifeSummary: When Geoffroy I de Montfort-le-Hédé was born in 1145, in Montfort-sur-Meu, Ille-et-Vilaine, Brittany, France, his father, Guillaume de Montfort-le-Hédé I, was 30 and his mother, Amicie de Rohun de Porhoët, was 21. He married Gervaise de Saye in 1168. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 2 daughters. He died in 1187, in Rennes, Ille-et-Vilaine, Brittany, France, at the age of 42.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Geoffroy I de Montfort-le-Hédé est né en 1145, à Montfort-sur-Meu, Ille-et-Vilaine, Bretagne, France, son père, Guillaume de Montfort-le-Hédé I, avait 30 ans et sa mère, Amicie de Rohun de Porhoët, avait 21 ans. Il a épousé Gervaise de Saye en 1168. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 2 filles. Il est décédé en 1187, à Rennes, Ille-et-Vilaine, Bretagne, France, à l’âge de 42 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Geoffroy I de Montfort-le-Hédé 1145 in Montfort-sur-Meu, Ille-et-Vilaine, Bretagne, Frankreich geboren wurde, war sein Vater Guillaume de Montfort-le-Hédé I 30 und seine Mutter Amicie de Rohun de Porhoët 21. Er hat 1168 Gervaise de Saye geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Er starb 1187 im Alter von 42 Jahren in Rennes, Ille-et-Vilaine, Bretagne, Frankreich.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Geoffroy I de Montfort-le-Hédé è nato il nel 1145 nel Montfort-sur-Meu, Ille-et-Vilaine, Bretagne, Francia, il suo padre, Guillaume de Montfort-le-Hédé I, aveva 30 anni e il suo madre, Amicie de Rohun de Porhoët, aveva 21 anni. Lui sposato Gervaise de Saye nel 1168. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 2 figlie. Morì nel 1187, nel Rennes, Ille-et-Vilaine, Bretagne, Francia, all'età di 42 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Geoffroy I de Montfort-le-Hédéが1145年にフランスブレタグンイレ-エト-ヴィレアインモントフォート-スル-メウで生まれた時，父Guillaume de Montfort-le-Hédé Iは30歳，母Amicie de Rohun de Porhoëtは21歳であった。1168年にGervaise de Sayeと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼は1187年にフランスブレタグンイレ-エト-ヴィレアインレンスで42歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Geoffroy I de Montfort-le-Hédé(이)가 1145년 프랑스 브레타그니 이레-트-빌레이인 몽포트-수-우에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Guillaume de Montfort-le-Hédé I(은)는 30세였고, 그의 어머니 Amicie de Rohun de Porhoët(은)는 21세였다. 그는 1168년 Gervaise de Saye(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1187년 프랑스 브레타그니 이레-트-빌레이인 렌스에서 42세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Geoffroy I de Montfort-le-Hédé nasceu em 1145, em Montfort-sur-Meu, Ille-et-Vilaine, Bretagne, França, seu pai, Guillaume de Montfort-le-Hédé I, tinha 30 anos e sua mãe, Amicie de Rohun de Porhoët, tinha 21 anos. Ele casou-se com Gervaise de Saye em 1168. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 2 filhas. Ele faleceu em 1187, em Rennes, Ille-et-Vilaine, Bretagne, França, com 42 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Geoffroy I de Montfort-le-Hédé родился в 1145 г. в местности монтфорт-сур-меу, илле-ет-вилеин, бретагн, Франция, его отцу по имени Guillaume de Montfort-le-Hédé I было 30 лет, а матери, которую звали Amicie de Rohun de Porhoët, 21. Он женился на женщине по имени Gervaise de Saye в 1168 г. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 2 дочери. Он умер в 1187 г. в местности реннесь, илле-ет-вилеин, бретагн, Франция в возрасте 42 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Geoffroy I de Montfort-le-Hédé nació en 1145, en Montfort-sur-Meu, Ille-et-Vilaine, Bretagne, Francia, su papá, Guillaume de Montfort-le-Hédé I, tenía 30 años y su mamá, Amicie de Rohun de Porhoët, tenía 21 años. Se casó con Gervaise de Saye en 1168. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió en 1187, en Rennes, Ille-et-Vilaine, Bretagne, Francia, a la edad de 42 años.
